case_title: SIXTH STREET BALDWIN HOUSE HOTEL LLC VS. MARK PAGANELLI et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF HOWARD OLSEN IN SUPPORT OF CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SIXTH STREET BALDWIN HOUSE HOTEL LLC
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT PAGANELLI, MARK
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE IS $ 15.00 PER DAY FILED BY PLAINTIFF SIXTH STREET BALDWIN HOUSE HOTEL LLC
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SIXTH STREET BALDWIN HOUSE HOTEL LLC AS TO DEFENDANT PAGANELLI, MARK DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF SIXTH STREET BALDWIN HOUSE HOTEL LLC SERVED DEC-03-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT PAGANELLI, MARK
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT PAGANELLI, MARK
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT PAGANELLI, MARK

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SIXTH STREET BALDWIN HOUSE HOTEL LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PAGANELLI, MARK THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 74 6TH STREET, #411, SAN FRANCISCO CA. 94103, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
